div.class: relative w-[960px] h-[540px] bg-white overflow-hidden $class
absolute left-[0px] top-[270px] w-[960px] h-[1px] bg-slate-200
absolute left-[480px] top-[0px] w-[1px] h-[540px] bg-slate-200
absolute right-[0px] top-[0px] w-[286px] h-[540px] $bandTone
absolute left-[72px] top-[72px] w-[84px] h-[8px] rounded-full $accentTone

text.class: absolute left-[72px] top-[92px] text-[20px] font-semibold tracking-[4px] $kickerTone
absolute left-[72px] top-[136px] text-[64px] font-bold $titleTone
absolute left-[72px] top-[232px] w-[400px] text-[28px] leading-[1.35] $bodyTone

div.class: absolute right-[72px] bottom-[72px] w-[220px] h-[150px] rounded-[8px] $panelTone overflow-hidden
absolute left-[18px] top-[22px] w-[132px] h-[10px] rounded-full $panelMarkATone
absolute left-[18px] top-[46px] w-[176px] h-[8px] rounded-full $panelMarkBTone
absolute left-[18px] top-[66px] w-[120px] h-[8px] rounded-full $panelMarkCTone
absolute left-[18px] bottom-[18px] px-[10px] py-[5px] rounded-full $pillTone

text.class: text-[10px] font-bold $pillTextTone

div.class: $state flex flex-row gap-[8px]

text.class: w-[16px] text-[11px] font-medium text-right $numTone

div.class: relative w-[144px] h-[81px] rounded-[4px] bg-white overflow-hidden border-[2px] $frameTone
absolute inset-0 border-[2px] border-[#D97757] rounded-[3px] opacity-0
absolute left-[10px] top-[10px] w-[88px] h-[8px] rounded-full $titleTone
absolute left-[10px] bottom-[10px] w-[42px] h-[28px] rounded-[4px] $markATone
absolute left-[58px] bottom-[10px] w-[42px] h-[28px] rounded-[4px] $markBTone
absolute right-[10px] bottom-[10px] w-[24px] h-[28px] rounded-[4px] $markCTone
relative w-[1280px] h-[720px] bg-black overflow-hidden
absolute left-[0px] top-[0px] bottom-[0px] w-[188px] bg-[#141414] border-r-[1px] border-[#ffffff14] flex flex-col gap-[12px] px-[10px] py-[12px]
absolute left-[185px] top-[0px] bottom-[0px] w-[6px] bg-[#ffffff00]
absolute left-[188px] top-[0px] right-[0px] bottom-[0px] flex items-center justify-center bg-black
relative w-[960px] h-[540px] overflow-hidden

stage-slide.title: SplitText
stage-slide.body: Characters split into independent units, tint in motion, then converge back into a stable layout.

div.class: absolute left-[626px] top-[74px] w-[76px] h-[76px] rounded-full bg-[#22d3ee]/25 border-[1px] border-[#22d3ee]/50
absolute right-[92px] top-[130px] w-[42px] h-[42px] rounded-full bg-[#facc15]/45
absolute left-[432px] bottom-[82px] w-[54px] h-[54px] rounded-full bg-[#34d399]/35
absolute right-[328px] bottom-[156px] w-[34px] h-[34px] rounded-full bg-[#d946ef]/30
absolute left-[608px] top-[176px] w-[246px] h-[146px] rounded-[8px] border-[1px] border-slate-300 bg-white/60
absolute left-[0px] top-[72px] w-[246px] h-[1px] bg-slate-200
absolute left-[122px] top-[0px] w-[1px] h-[146px] bg-slate-200

text.class: absolute left-[22px] top-[22px] text-[15px] font-semibold text-slate-500
absolute left-[22px] bottom-[26px] text-[22px] font-bold text-slate-950

div.class: absolute left-[520px] top-[112px] w-[130px] h-[3px] rounded-full bg-[#22d3ee]
absolute right-[114px] top-[354px] w-[120px] h-[3px] rounded-full bg-[#f97316]
absolute left-[646px] bottom-[72px] w-[156px] h-[3px] rounded-full bg-[#8b5cf6]

stage-slide.title: Subtree FX
stage-slide.body: HTML in Canvas: capture an XML subtree as a texture, pass it through an SKSL RuntimeEffect, then paint the warped result back.

canvas.class: absolute right-[24px] top-[92px] w-[404px] h-[304px] rounded-[8px] overflow-hidden bg-[#111827] border-[1px] border-[#f59e0b]/45

div.class: absolute inset-0 bg-[#111827]
absolute left-[0px] top-[0px] w-[404px] h-[42px] bg-[#1f2937] border-b-[1px] border-[#ffffff1f]
absolute left-[18px] top-[15px] w-[10px] h-[10px] rounded-full bg-[#fb7185]
absolute left-[36px] top-[15px] w-[10px] h-[10px] rounded-full bg-[#fbbf24]
absolute left-[54px] top-[15px] w-[10px] h-[10px] rounded-full bg-[#34d399]

text.class: absolute right-[18px] top-[12px] text-[12px] font-semibold text-[#d1d5db]

div.class: absolute left-[28px] top-[70px] w-[348px] h-[184px] rounded-[8px] bg-white border-[1px] border-[#fed7aa]
absolute left-[204px] top-[18px] w-[118px] h-[118px] rounded-full bg-[#f59e0b]/25

text.class: absolute left-[26px] top-[24px] text-[12px] font-bold text-[#c2410c]
absolute left-[26px] top-[54px] text-[32px] font-bold text-[#431407]

div.class: absolute left-[26px] top-[112px] w-[214px] h-[9px] rounded-full bg-[#fdba74]
absolute left-[26px] top-[134px] w-[268px] h-[9px] rounded-full bg-[#fed7aa]
absolute right-[24px] bottom-[22px] px-[10px] py-[6px] rounded-full bg-[#431407]

text.class: text-[11px] font-bold text-white
absolute left-[28px] bottom-[24px] text-[16px] font-semibold text-[#fed7aa]

div.class: absolute left-[484px] top-[208px] w-[66px] h-[3px] rounded-full bg-[#f59e0b]
absolute left-[536px] top-[198px] w-[22px] h-[3px] rounded-full bg-[#f59e0b]
absolute left-[536px] top-[218px] w-[22px] h-[3px] rounded-full bg-[#f59e0b]

text.class: absolute left-[558px] top-[414px] text-[16px] font-bold text-[#9a3412]

stage-slide.title: Show lines
stage-slide.body: The final beat keeps the structure simple: draw the guides, reveal each row, and let the layout read clearly.

div.class: absolute left-[540px] top-[88px] w-[344px] h-[344px] rounded-[8px] border-[1px] border-[#a5f3fc] bg-white/75 overflow-hidden
absolute left-[0px] top-[68px] w-[344px] h-[1px] bg-[#bae6fd]
absolute left-[0px] top-[136px] w-[344px] h-[1px] bg-[#bae6fd]
absolute left-[0px] top-[204px] w-[344px] h-[1px] bg-[#bae6fd]
absolute left-[0px] top-[272px] w-[344px] h-[1px] bg-[#bae6fd]
absolute left-[18px] top-[84px] w-[308px] h-[48px] rounded-[8px] bg-[#cffafe]

text.class: absolute left-[28px] top-[24px] text-[24px] font-bold text-[#164e63]
absolute left-[28px] top-[92px] text-[24px] font-bold text-[#0e7490]
absolute left-[28px] top-[160px] text-[24px] font-bold text-[#155e75]
absolute left-[28px] top-[228px] text-[24px] font-bold text-[#164e63]
absolute left-[28px] top-[296px] text-[24px] font-bold text-[#0891b2]

div.class: absolute left-[532px] top-[460px] w-[364px] h-[4px] rounded-full bg-[#0891b2]
absolute left-[532px] top-[478px] w-[248px] h-[4px] rounded-full bg-[#67e8f9]
absolute left-[532px] top-[496px] w-[318px] h-[4px] rounded-full bg-[#a5f3fc]
absolute left-[542px] bottom-[22px] h-[36px] flex flex-row items-center gap-[4px] px-[4px] py-[4px] rounded-full bg-black text-white
w-[28px] h-[28px] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
relative w-[64px] h-[28px] flex items-center justify-center

text.class: absolute text-[12px] font-medium text-white
absolute text-[12px] font-medium text-white opacity-0
absolute text-[12px] font-medium text-white opacity-0

div.class: w-[28px] h-[28px] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
w-[1px] h-[14px] bg-white/20 ml-[2px] mr-[2px]
h-[28px] rounded-full flex flex-row items-center gap-[6px] px-[10px]

text.class: text-[11px] font-medium text-white/75
text-[10px] text-white bg-white/10 rounded-[4px] px-[4px] py-[2px]
